elo_rating.description: World Football Elo rating (eloratings.net; higher = stronger). Feeds the football odds model.

elo_rank.description: World rank in the eloratings.net table at harvest time

elo_source.description: Provenance URL for the Elo rating

elo_harvested_at.description: UTC ISO timestamp when the Elo rating was harvested

gnp_usd.description: Gross National Income (World Bank, current US$), the modern equivalent of GNP

gnp_per_capita_usd.description: GNI per capita (World Bank Atlas method, current US$)

gni_per_capita_ppp_usd.description: GNI per capita at purchasing power parity (UNDP HDR 2025, 2021 PPP $; reference year 2023). Null where the source lacks an entry (Curaçao).

population.description: Total population (World Bank; ONS for England/Scotland)

wc_titles.description: Men's World Cup titles won (predecessor states included, e.g. West Germany, Czechoslovakia)

wc_appearances.description: World Cup final-tournament appearances through 2022 (predecessor states included)

gdp_growth_pct.description: Annual real GDP growth, % (World Bank NY.GDP.MKTP.KD.ZG); may be negative

inflation_pct.description: Consumer-price inflation, annual % (World Bank FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG); may be negative

unemployment_pct.description: Unemployment, % of total labour force (ILO modelled / World Bank SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS)

hdi.description: Human Development Index, 0-1 (UNDP HDR; higher = more developed)

hdi_year.description: Reference year for the HDI value

gini_index.description: Income inequality, 0-100 (World Bank SI.POV.GINI; higher = more unequal)

median_age_years.description: Population median age in years (UN World Population Prospects)

corruption_perceptions_index.description: Transparency International CPI, 0-100 (higher = cleaner / less corrupt)

political_stability.description: World Bank WGI Political Stability & Absence of Violence, approx -2.5..+2.5 (higher = more stable)

government_effectiveness.description: World Bank WGI Government Effectiveness, approx -2.5..+2.5 (higher = more effective)

press_freedom_score.description: RSF World Press Freedom Index score, 0-100 (higher = freer press)

global_peace_index.description: IEP Global Peace Index, approx 1-5 (LOWER = more peaceful)

indicators_year.description: Reference year for the political/economic indicators (most recent available; see seed_politico_economic.py for per-source years)
